bubble_data.size_text: Comprehensive (member country adoption tracking, 2026 update shows 19/23 countries aligned)

bubble_data.authority: Estonian Government (Ministry of Economic Affairs and Communications)
Artificial Intelligence Impact Institute (AIID, US-based nonprofit)
Slovenian Academy of Sciences and Arts (Research Institute)

bubble_data.region: Estonian, Latvian, Lithuanian (with English abstracts)/Baltic region

bubble_data.authority: Japanese Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-005: Police/court/platform authority source, election-authority notice, securities/consumer record, or forensics/contract record tying the content to a legal process. || LQ-008: Non-finance procurement challenge, contract text, technical audit, official correction, regulator document, or later public disposition.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-005: The presence of generated content does not establish intent, materiality, attributable actor, or legal threshold crossed. || LQ-008: Current strong support remains concentrated in U.S. finance and venture-facing enforcement/charging records; the non-finance signal remains weak and the Nate row is still charging-stage rather than disposition-grade.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Impossible to conclude illegality or AI Act breach from media allegations alone
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Legal-risk heatmap by category and evidence tier

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-006: Provider/deployer incident report, architectural postmortem, formal vendor bulletin keyed to the exact CVE, or reproducible public test.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-006: Public CVEs and advisories reveal control surfaces, but usually not deployment setting, duty holder, realized harm, or reportability threshold.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Public evidence often cannot show whether duty-to-report thresholds or formal security obligations were triggered
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Security-to-governance edge list for graph/table views

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-006: Provider/deployer incident report, architectural postmortem, formal vendor bulletin keyed to the exact CVE, or reproducible public test.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-006: Public CVEs and advisories reveal control surfaces, but usually not deployment setting, duty holder, realized harm, or reportability threshold.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Cannot infer non-compliance or defective oversight solely from anecdotal demonstrations
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Agentic-control matrix linking case type to oversight evidence needs

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-001: Procurement file, register entry, DPIA/FRIA-equivalent, project specification, election-operations record, or official deployment statement. || LQ-004: Court complaint/decree, school/employer policy, official redress record, or regulator notice text. || LQ-009: Taxonomy review memo plus stronger authoritative source package for the first residual/research-integrity case, direct-source capture for absurdity leads, or a new anchor that narrows framework fit.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-001: Regulator/news/project pages can show that an authority discussed, piloted, regulated, or responded to a system, but often do not resolve procurement route, legal basis, deployment stage, or exact public-body function. || LQ-004: Public narratives usually do not expose comparator evidence, final decision authority, appeal/redress path, or the exact decision model role. || LQ-009: Salience alone does not identify the right legal or standards framework, and several rows remain placeholders or title-level leads only.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Often impossible to separate organizational dysfunction from AI-specific legal significance using public evidence alone
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Public-sector absurdity typology and dashboard filter

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-001: Procurement file, register entry, DPIA/FRIA-equivalent, project specification, election-operations record, or official deployment statement. || LQ-002: Underlying notice/reprimand text, legal basis, technical specification, or official audit/procurement document.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-001: Regulator/news/project pages can show that an authority discussed, piloted, regulated, or responded to a system, but often do not resolve procurement route, legal basis, deployment stage, or exact public-body function. || LQ-002: Public material still omits underlying notice text, legal basis, operational parameters, and whether the system is proposed, piloted, or fully deployed.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Public silence or incomplete procurement records cannot by themselves establish hidden prohibited or high-risk use
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Map-ready country/authority evidence-gap matrix plus public-sector disclosure comparison

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-005: Police/court/platform authority source, election-authority notice, securities/consumer record, or forensics/contract record tying the content to a legal process.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-005: The presence of generated content does not establish intent, materiality, attributable actor, or legal threshold crossed.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Legal characterization often depends on context, intent, target, and applicable speech/privacy/fraud law beyond public evidence
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Synthetic-identity topology linking media, provenance evidence, and harm types

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-007: Court filing/order, institutional correction notice, or official Finnish police/court process-integrity statement for a second document-grade family.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-007: A regulator order plus one broadcaster account is still not enough to generalize process-contamination doctrine across courts, agencies, or administrative workflows.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Public examples rarely show whether contamination came from user misuse, vendor design, or institutional process failure
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Process-contamination typology for justice/admin case tables

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-003: Official safety notice, clinical guidance, court/regulator record, or provider documentation with intended-use detail.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-003: Health-sector interpretation depends on intended use, device/professional regime, causation, and safety posture that news reports rarely resolve.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Impossible to infer certification, standard-of-care breach, or high-risk status from weak public evidence
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Sector split for health-related LIMEN cases with uncertainty flags

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-004: Court complaint/decree, school/employer policy, official redress record, or regulator notice text.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-004: Public narratives usually do not expose comparator evidence, final decision authority, appeal/redress path, or the exact decision model role.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Public reporting usually lacks sufficient data on model function, decision authority, and comparator treatment

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-005: Police/court/platform authority source, election-authority notice, securities/consumer record, or forensics/contract record tying the content to a legal process. || LQ-008: Non-finance procurement challenge, contract text, technical audit, official correction, regulator document, or later public disposition.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-005: The presence of generated content does not establish intent, materiality, attributable actor, or legal threshold crossed. || LQ-008: Current strong support remains concentrated in U.S. finance and venture-facing enforcement/charging records; the non-finance signal remains weak and the Nate row is still charging-stage rather than disposition-grade.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Cannot infer regulatory breach, discriminatory effect, or regulated-system scope from anecdotal market stories alone
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Sectoral harm matrix across finance/insurance/market records

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-002: Underlying notice/reprimand text, legal basis, technical specification, or official audit/procurement document.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-002: Public material still omits underlying notice text, legal basis, operational parameters, and whether the system is proposed, piloted, or fully deployed.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Very difficult to reach final legal conclusions without authoritative legal text, official notice, or court/regulator record
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Fundamental-rights review queue, public-authority map, and disclosure-comparison companion table

uncertainty_matrix_data.minimum_stronger_source_needed: LQ-009: Taxonomy review memo plus stronger authoritative source package for the first residual/research-integrity case, direct-source capture for absurdity leads, or a synchronized first-seed execution around the NEJM candidate if shared consumers are updated together.
uncertainty_matrix_data.why_public_evidence_is_insufficient: LQ-009: Salience alone does not identify the right legal or standards framework, and the current seven-row research-integrity shadow package now includes one archived non-Springer direct notice plus two Springer direct notices while remaining below seeded shared-row status until an explicit synchronized admission decision is executed.
uncertainty_matrix_data.legal_conclusion_limit: Often impossible to distinguish misconduct, weak process, and tool failure without stronger institutional evidence; zero seeded count here does not mean no local package exists
uncertainty_matrix_data.observatory_hook: Research-integrity dashboard slice, zero-seed sidecar, and methods-paper examples
